_comment: Task set for the 3-harness benchmark. Each task family targets a distinct graph projection. Gold is defined STRUCTURALLY (computed from the live graph) so it is reproducible and not hand-curated, EXCEPT the issue-localization tasks which reuse CODE_GRAPH §7 human gold. 'goldMode' tells the oracle how to derive gold.

tasks.note: Firehose hub (59 files, 52 test). Gold = production (non-test) files in the blast radius. Tests RANKING under test pollution.
Distinctive name, real caller set. Gold = files with a direct call edge.
queryEngine.search — deep forward reach. Gold = files in the forward call closure (depth 3).
Whole-repo: gold = symbols with no edge AND no name-reference (after dispatch filter).
Whole-repo: gold = top-10 in-degree production files (the refactor attack order).
Gold = the sibling *.test.ts(x) for the changed module (source->test pairing).
